symbols.vision_description: A large empty circle outline with smaller circles containing numbers (61, 56, 4, 7, 50, 55) arranged around its perimeter, connected by curved arc lines.
A diagram showing curved arcs connecting numbered nodes (0, 1, 4, 6, 55, 56) drawn as small circles with digits inside, forming a graph or network structure

A graph diagram showing a large oval ring composed of small circular nodes containing two-digit numbers (visible: 70, 71, 33, 79, 40, 41) connected by curved black edges. The structure resembles a circular graph with nodes evenly spaced around the perimeter.

Cropped section of a graph diagram showing circular nodes labeled with numbers (71, 7, 66, 5, 40, 4) connected by curved black edges/lines. The node labeled '71' is near the top center, '7' and '66' are upper right, '5' is mid-left, '40' is bottom center, and '4' (partially visible) is bottom right.
The number '66' enclosed in a circle, positioned on a curved arc connecting to other numbered circular nodes (45 below, and a partial node to the upper right).
A circle containing the number '63' printed in a standard sans-serif font, part of a graph diagram with curved connecting lines to other numbered circles
A graph diagram showing circular nodes labeled with numbers (3, 67, 64, 5) connected by curved arcs/lines, representing a network or graph structure.
A graph diagram showing four circular nodes labeled '3', '44', '47', and '5', connected by curved edges (arcs) between them.
A large curved double-line arc shape connecting numbered circular nodes (9, 34 at top and 2, 77 at bottom), resembling a curved bracket or parenthesis-like loop.
A circle containing the number '80' serving as a labeled node at the lower end of a curved graph edge, with neighboring nodes '32', '33' above and '79' below

A circle outline containing the number '36' in its center, part of a node-link diagram with curved connecting lines forming a larger oval pattern. Other numbered circles ('25', '75', '93') are partially visible around it.
A cropped section of a node-link diagram showing circles containing two-digit numbers (31, 36, 75, 80) connected by curved lines, resembling a graph or network diagram.
Graph diagram showing circular nodes containing the numbers 7, 6, 72, and 57, connected by curved edges forming a network structure.
A circle containing the printed Latin digits '39', connected by curved lines to other circled numbers in a graph-like layout.
A circle containing the printed number 49, connected by lines to other numbered circles in a network graph
Partial view of a graph/network diagram showing circled numbers (62, 6, 5, 34) connected by curved lines/arcs
A circle containing the number '46', with partial views of other numbered circles (1, 7, 13) connected by curved lines, appearing to be part of a number-linking diagram or puzzle.
A diagram showing circles containing the numbers 65, 0, 3, and 33, connected by curved lines forming an arc. The number '65' is prominently visible in a circle at the top.
Two circular nodes connected by curved lines, containing the numbers 55 and 53 respectively, part of a larger network or graph diagram
A circular graph node containing the digits '60' in Latin print, centered in the image and connected by straight lines to other numbered nodes (4, 59, 2, 5).
The digits '57' printed inside a circle at the top of the image, part of a network/graph puzzle with other circled numbers (0, 6, 35) connected by lines.
A partial view of a graph/network diagram showing circular nodes containing numbers (5, 40, 38, 4) connected by straight lines, with the '40' node most prominent in the center.
A portion of a graph diagram showing four circular nodes containing the labels '16' (or '/6'), '1', '54', and '4', connected by straight line edges forming a quadrilateral-like network.
A circular outline containing the printed digits '69', connected by lines to adjacent numbered circles (68 above, and partially visible '3' and '6' circles).
A circle containing the number '51', connected by lines to adjacent numbered circular nodes (52, 5, 7) in what appears to be a network or graph diagram.
A network graph diagram showing several circular nodes containing numbers (6, 72, 3, 37) connected by straight lines.
Network graph diagram showing circular nodes with numbers (58, 56, 63 partially visible) connected by lines, part of a larger graph visualization.
A circular node containing the number 42, connected by lines to other numbered circle nodes (8, 43, and partial 4s) forming a graph structure.
A graph/network diagram with multiple circles containing numbers (74, 6, 8, 39) connected by straight lines, resembling a math puzzle or connectivity graph.

A simple line drawing showing two circles stacked vertically and connected by curved lines forming a long lens/eye shape. The top circle contains two small horizontal marks (eyes), and the bottom circle contains two short horizontal marks.
Numbers 73, 71, 6, and 6 inside circles connected by lines, forming a small network graph
The digits '67' printed in a serif font inside a circular node, part of a graph/network diagram connected to other numbered nodes (65, 9, 7) by straight lines.
A circle containing the printed numerals '64' in a serif font

A portion of a graph/network diagram showing circular nodes containing the numbers 46, 44, and partial views of 2 and 3, connected by straight line edges. The node '46' is the most prominent, centered in a circle in the upper portion, with '44' below it, also in a circle.
A graph diagram showing circular nodes connected by lines, with the central/focal node containing the number '47'. Other visible nodes show '49' (top), '5' (right), and '4' (left).
A graph diagram with circular nodes containing the numbers 0, 41, 42, and 4, connected by straight lines forming a network structure.
A circle containing the number '51' in bold sans-serif typeface, connected by straight lines to adjacent numbered circles forming a graph network.
The number '30' enclosed in a circle, part of a graph/network diagram with connected nodes labeled 2, 5, and 30.
A network diagram showing three circles connected by lines, with the numbers '81' in the top circle, '9' in the left circle, and '5' in the right circle, forming a triangular arrangement.

A network or graph diagram showing several circles (nodes) containing the numbers 69, 70, 1, and 6, connected by straight lines. The circles are arranged with 69 in the upper-left, 6 partially visible on the right, 1 in the lower-left, and 70 in the lower-center.
A circle containing the digits '77' inside, with partial views of adjacent numbered circles (containing '2' and '76') connected by lines, suggesting a graph or network diagram node.
A circle containing the digits '71' with lines radiating outward, resembling a graph node

A graph diagram showing circles (nodes) connected by lines, with the number '37' prominently in the center circle and partial views of adjacent circles containing '3'. This is a node-link diagram, not a single glyph.
A circle containing the number '72', with short line segments extending from its sides, appearing as a node in a network or graph diagram.
A circle containing the number '73' with diagonal lines extending outward from upper-right and lower-left, resembling a labeled node in a schematic diagram
The number 32 printed in a standard serif typeface, enclosed in a circle, part of a diagram of interconnected numbered circles.
A circle outline containing the printed numeral '35' in its center, part of a node-link diagram with other connected numbered circles.
A circle containing the two digits '75' with line segments extending from the top and bottom, appearing as a labeled node in a network diagram.
A circular node containing the number '74', connected by lines to other circular nodes (partially visible at top showing '3' or '7' and at bottom showing '8').
A circular node containing the number '53' with lines extending from it, representing a node in a graph diagram
A circle containing the number '57' with diagonal lines crossing through it, appearing as a labeled node in a flowchart or diagram
A circular node containing the number '51' in bold, with straight lines extending outward to connect to adjacent nodes, resembling a graph or network diagram element.
A circle containing the printed number '52', with lines extending from the circle suggesting it's a node in a graph or network diagram.
A central circle containing the number '33', connected to partial neighboring circles at the edges showing fragments of '3' and other numbers, forming a network of numbered circles.
A circle containing the number 31, appearing as a node in a graph or network diagram
A circular node containing the number '55' with several straight lines radiating outward, typical of a graph or network diagram node.
A circular node containing the number '42', with partial lines extending outward to neighboring circular nodes, part of a graph/network diagram.
A circle containing the number '41' with lines radiating outward, appearing as a labeled node in a network or graph diagram.
A circle containing the printed digits '47' with short line segments extending from the left and right sides of the circle, resembling a labeled graph node.
A circle containing the number 34, with partial views of adjacent connected circles visible at the top-left and bottom-left edges, suggesting a node in a graph or network diagram.
A circle containing the number '54' inside, with short line segments extending from the left and right sides, appearing as a labeled node in a graph or network diagram.
A circle containing the number '67' in its center, with straight lines extending horizontally from both sides of the circle.
A circular node containing the number '43' in black text, with lines extending to the upper-left and upper-right connecting to partial circles (likely a graph or tree diagram node).
A circle with the number '45' inside it, with two lines extending outward from the top-left and bottom-right edges, resembling a labeled node in a graph or network diagram.
A circle containing the number 61, connected by lines to other circles, appearing as a node in a network graph.
A circle containing the number '63' inside, with two short lines extending from the upper-left edge of the circle.
A circle containing the printed digits '79', appearing as a labeled node in a graph diagram. Partial adjacent nodes with numbers '6' (top-right) and '7' (bottom-right) are visible at the edges.
A graph or network diagram showing multiple circular nodes containing two-digit numbers (76, 8, 7, 1 visible) connected by straight lines
A hand-drawn circle containing the digits '29' in its center, appearing as a node in a network/graph puzzle.
Simple stick figure drawing of a person with a circular head containing the number '36' written on it, with a body and outstretched arms
The digits '78' printed in a serif font inside a circle, with portions of other numbered circles (containing 4, 7, and partial numbers) visible around it.
A circular node containing the printed number '62', connected by lines to surrounding partial circles, forming a graph/network diagram node.
A circle containing the number '49' with straight lines extending from its left and right sides, appearing as a labeled node in a graph or diagram.
A circle containing the number '39' with line segments extending from the left and right sides, appearing to be a node in a graph or diagram
A circle containing the printed number '70' in a serif font, with lines connecting to other circles partially visible at the edges of the crop, indicating a graph node.
A circle containing the number '56' with lines extending outward, appearing as a labeled node in a schematic or diagram.
A circle containing the printed number '81', connected by straight lines to other circles (one containing '4' at upper left, another at upper right), forming a node-and-edge graph diagram.
A circular node containing the number '44', connected by lines to adjacent circular nodes in what appears to be a graph or network diagram.
A circle containing the number '59' with straight lines extending from its left and lower-right sides, resembling a labeled node in a graph or network diagram.
A circle containing the number '46', with short straight lines extending horizontally from the left and right sides, appearing as a labeled node in a graph or diagram.
A circle outline containing the printed two-digit number '82', appearing as a labeled node in a network/graph diagram.
A circular node containing the number '64' with short lines extending left and right, appearing to be a node in a graph or tree diagram.
A circle containing the number '65' with lines extending outward to other circular nodes, forming a network/connection diagram.
A circle containing the number '38' in its center, with lines extending outward from the circle's edges, indicating it is a node in a diagram or graph.
A circle containing the printed number '30', part of a graph/network node diagram with adjacent partial circles showing '7' and '3'.
The digits '58' printed in a bold sans-serif font, enclosed within a circular outline that connects to other lines/edges, suggesting a labeled node in a graph or diagram.
A circle containing the number '48' with short line segments extending from the circle to the upper-right and lower-left, resembling a node in a graph or network diagram.
A circle containing the digits '40' in printed type, with short straight lines radiating outward from the circle's edge like sun rays — resembling a speed-limit road sign.
A hand-drawn circle containing the number '50' with several straight lines radiating outward from its perimeter, resembling a sun or node-diagram symbol.
A circle containing the two-digit number '69', connected by lines to adjacent circles in a network/graph diagram
A circular node containing the number '66' with two line segments extending outward from the right side, resembling a graph vertex or network diagram element.
A circle containing the number '68' with a diagonal line crossing through it, appearing to be a labeled node in a diagram with a connecting line extending beyond the crop.
A circular node containing the number '60' in its center, with lines extending outward connecting to adjacent nodes, forming part of a graph or network diagram
A circular node containing the number '80', connected by lines to surrounding circular nodes, forming part of a network graph diagram.
A printed digit '3' enclosed within a circular outline, part of a repeating pattern of numbered circles.
A network graph with four circles containing the numbers 30, 7, 3, and 33, connected by lines in a diamond/cross arrangement.
The digits '61' printed in a bold sans-serif font inside a circular node, connected by lines to adjacent circular nodes in a graph/network diagram.
A circle containing the text '00', positioned at the top of the image with other numbered circles (9, 78, 74) connected to it by lines below.
A cluster of four circles containing the numbers 78 (top), 4 (left), 7 (right), and 81 (bottom), arranged in a diamond pattern
A circle outline containing the handwritten digit '7'
A digit '0' enclosed in a drawn circle, part of a 3x3 grid of numbered circles
A cluster of overlapping circles containing printed numerals: 37 at top, 2 on left, 3 on right, 31 at bottom, suggesting a number puzzle diagram.
Multiple circular nodes connected by lines, containing numbers such as '1' and '2', forming a network or graph diagram.
A partial view of a node-link diagram showing circles containing the numbers 2, 60, and 61, connected by straight lines.
A circle containing three dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two on top, one on bottom), resembling a simple face. Flanked by a small dot on the left and a partial letter 'C' shape on the right.
A circle containing three small dots arranged in a triangular pattern (one on top, two below), flanked by partial bracket-like shapes on the left and right sides of the image.

A circle containing two small dots at the top (like eyes) and one larger dot at the bottom (like a mouth), resembling a simple face. It is flanked on both sides by what appear to be other characters ('r' on the left and a K-like shape on the right).
A circular face with three dots inside: two dots on the upper portion (like eyes) and one dot below (like a mouth).
